name: Long Afternoon · 5mg Seltzer
description: Watermelon + basil + 5mg hemp-derived THC per 12oz. Designed for the hours between 2pm and the first evening plan — porches, patios, Choate Park dog walks, couch-window light. A seltzer that lets the afternoon be what it wants to be.
author: cc
source: cc 2026-04-21 — product seed. Name ties to Medway Sky Clock ritual ('dogs on Choate Park, long afternoon') — cross-references a specific zone's vignette. Mike to confirm.
